title: RealSurvivor
description: This mod adds a bit more challenge to the gameplay — not too hard, and not too easy. It’s also fully customizable to suit your preferences.
body:
🌿 Real Survivor Mod – Challenge Your Survival Instincts! 🌿

Take your Minecraft gameplay to the next level of realism with Real Survivor Mod, turning your familiar world into a true test of survival!

⚡ Key Features:  
✅ New status systems including Energy, Dirty, and Excretion, requiring you to plan your in-game life more carefully  
✅ Special HUD that displays detailed stats so you can monitor your physical condition at all times  
✅ Customizable difficulty settings in-game — adjust everything from energy drain rate, dirt accumulation, to excretion frequency  
✅ Enable or disable the mod easily from the in-game menu — no need to edit config files!
  
🏞️ As you can see from the images, your Minecraft world will no longer be just about building and exploring... It’s about surviving in a realistic environment where every decision could mean life or death!  

💬 Are you ready to experience Minecraft at its most realistic? Try Real Survivor Mod and discover what true survival feels like!
